segments: Nate : Hey Joanna! Long time no see! What ' s up? Anything fun? Joanna : Hey Nate! Long time no see! been working on a project lately cool. about you any fun projects or hobbies? Nate : Hey Joanna! cool! won first video game tournament last week exciting! Joanna : Nate! Congrats on winning! more what game it? Nate : Thanks team shooter game. Joanna : great job! What called? Nate game Counter - Strike : Global Offensive me team had blast to end! Joanna : Cool, Nate! fun experience not into games. Nate : about you? any hobbies love? Joanna :! Besides writing enjoy reading watching movies exploring nature. Nate? Nate Playing video games watching movies main hobbies. Joanna : Cool, Nate! similar interests. type movies like best? Nate love action and sci - fi movies effects cool! favorite genre? Joanna about dramas and romcoms love immersed in feelings plots. Nate : movies powerful! recommendations for me? Joanna : seen romantic drama about memory and relationships? good one. Nate : check out soon love watching classics. Joanna : movie awesome first watched around 3 years ago physical copy! Nate : Sounds cool! seen it a lot? movie well! Joanna : few times one of favorites! like idea and acting. Nate : Cool! check it out. Thanks for recommendation! Joanna : No problem, Nate! know if you like it

Joanna : Hey Nate! Haven ' t talked in few days. Crazy things happened me! Nate : Hi Joanna! Long time no see! What '? sound excited! Joanna : Woo! finished first full screenplay printed last Friday. working on for a while relief to have it all done! Nate : sounds awesome! What ' s about? Glad it ' s all down! Joanna : Thanks, Nate! mix of drama romance! Nate : amazing! feel now finished? new plans? Joanna : Woohoo, Nate! feeling rollercoaster of emotions - relief excitement anxiety - over finishing project. submit to film festivals get producers directors to check out. hoping! Nate : Congrats, Joanna! wild experience Rock on hope love it! Joanna Thanks Nate mix of emotions leads to positive feedback new opportunities. Nate : Hoping for like little ones around keep me calm when things important nervous Joanna : How long had them? Nate for 3 years now bring tons of joy! Joanna! Adorable! Nate : Thanks turtles might be small big personalities. reccomend little guys for times of stress. Joanna : Good idea, Nate! think about it get pets of my own soon not allergic. been up to anything recently? Nate : start to hang out with people outside circle at tournament. cool! Joanna : sounds sweet weird relationship with being competitors? Nate :Some people more competitive others stick around more chill people. Joanna : makes sense! cheer them on even if lose? Nate : Absolutely! don ' t expect to win big here like playing for fun! mentioned allergic to pets earlier how bad? Joanna : bad face puffy itchy around certain animals always stayed away. Nate : Sorry hear Allergies tough allergic to? Joanna allergic to most reptiles animals with fur drag find other ways to be happy. Nate : Awesome! lots things bring joy without pets else brings joy? Joanna : Writing hanging with friends! express myself through stories or good time with people. Nate : great to hear! both great things glad to hear other things help through times axiousness despite not have animals! Joanna : Thanks Nate! Writing helps create wild worlds with awesome characters great way to express feelings can ' t imagine life without it. Nate : Joanna sounds amazing! Keep doing what you love! Joanna : Thanks, Nate! keep pursuing passion for writing. means a lot.

Joanna : Hey Nate long time no see! screenplay sent to film festival on my mind day everyday keep bouncing between emotions like relief excitement worry! Fingers crossed producer or director falls in love with it ends up on big screen awesome! What about you? Anything new exciting happening in life? Nate : Thanks Joanna Not much changed for discovered can make coconut milk icecream gave a try. pretty good proud of myself. Joanna : Looks delish! tried something new went well think? Nate : Super good! rich creamy - new favorite snack! Joanna : Great love when try something new works out. give another go? Nate : fun! looking forward to trying out different flavors toppings. Joanna favorite flavors for dairy - free desserts? Nate love coconut milk enjoy chocolate mixed berry flavors. Joanna great no to chocolate and berries? tempted to try dairy - free flavors now! Nate made dairy - free chocolate cake with berries other day! Joanna : talented. Thanks for sharing amazing creations! try making one or pay visit try one for myself! Nate t agree more always fun experimenting in kitchen. Joanna : cooking skills awesome.good movies lately? Thanks for recommendation! Joanna : Anytime! always down to give movie reccomendations. Nate : Good to know! shout watch! Joanna : Sounds great! know what you think when done! Nate : bet first to know. Joanna : Awesome! Enjoy yourself! Nate : take care! Joanna : Later, take care

Maybe other animals consider! meantime send pics of turtles watch grow without close. Joanna : Great idea! invested in little guys! Nate : Pets seem to do that to everyone they! what about your script now? ideas for next steps? Joanna : doing fair share of research networking non - stop tough determined to make it happen. Nate : Great idea! get more eyes. Keep hard work! Joanna : Thanks, Nate! support means a lot keep working next steps become clearer soon. Nate : don ' t quit - path forward show up soon. got this! Joanna : Appreciated! someone support me blessing gives motivation to keep pushing forward. Nate : Glad to hear support makes difference, Joanna here for you! Joanna : Always good to hear! See you later
